name: Corner the Market
description: Control 4 planets that each have the same planet trait.

name: Develop Weaponry
description: Own 2 unit upgrade technologies.

name: Diversify Research
description: Own 2 technologies in each of 2 different colors.

name: Erect a Monument
description: Spend 8 resources.

name: Establish a Perimeter
description: Have 4 or more PDS units on the game board.

name: Expand Borders
description: Control 6 planets outside of your home system.

name: Found Research Outposts
description: Control 3 planets that have technology specialties.

name: Intimidate Council
description: Have 1 or more ships in 2 systems that are adjacent to Mecatol Rex's system.

name: Lead from the Front
description: Spend a total of 3 command tokens.

name: Negotiate Trade Routes
description: Spend 5 trade goods.

name: Patrol Vast Territories
description: Have 1 or more ships in 5 systems that contain no planets.

name: Populate the Border
description: Have 9 or more ground forces on planets outside of your home system.

name: Sway the Council
description: Spend 8 influence.

name: Conquer the Weak
description: Control 1 planet that is in another player's home system.

name: Manipulate Galactic Law
description: Have 3 laws in play.

name: Mine Rare Metals
description: Control 4 hazardous planets outside of your home system.

name: Occupy the Seat of the Empire
description: Control Mecatol Rex and have 3 or more ships in its system.

name: Threaten Enemies
description: Have 1 or more ships in the home systems of 2 of your neighbors.

name: Command an Armada
description: Have 5 or more non-fighter ships in 1 system.

name: Construct Massive Cities
description: Have 7 or more structures on the game board.

name: Control the Borderlands
description: Have 1 or more ships in 5 systems that each contain a non-home planet.

name: Cut Supply Lines
description: Have 1 or more ships in the same system as 3 of your opponents' space docks.

name: Dominate the Sphere
description: Control Mecatol Rex and have 3 or more ships in its system.

name: Force Concessions
description: Control 4 planets that are in the home systems of other players.

name: Form Galactic Brain Trust
description: Control 5 planets that have technology specialties.

name: Found a Golden Age
description: Spend 16 resources.

name: Galvanize the People
description: Spend 6 command tokens.

name: Hoard Raw Materials
description: Spend 16 influence.

name: Mechanize the Military
description: Have 1 or more mechs on 4 planets outside of your home system.

name: Police the Borderlands
description: Control 8 planets outside of your home system.

name: Protect the Border
description: Have 5 or more structures on planets outside of your home system.

name: Reclaim Ancient Monuments
description: Control 3 legendary planets.

name: Rule Distant Lands
description: Control 2 planets that are each in or adjacent to a different player's home system.

name: Subdue the Galaxy
description: Have 1 or more dreadnoughts in 3 systems.

name: Unify the Colonies
description: Control 6 planets in systems that each contain a friendly space dock.

name: Centralize Discoveries
description: Control 4 legendary planets.

name: Assert Empathy
description: Have 10 or more influence on unexhausted planets you control.

name: Become a Martyr
description: Lose control of a planet in a home system.

name: Betray a Friend
description: Win a combat against a player you have a Promissory Note from.

name: Brave the Void
description: Win a combat in an anomaly.

name: Darken the Skies
description: Win a combat in the home system of another player.

name: Demonstrate Your Might
description: Have 1 or more dreadnoughts in the home system of another player.

name: Defy Gravity
description: Have 1 or more ships in a system that is not adjacent to a planet you control.

name: Destroy Their Greatest Ship
description: Destroy another player's war sun or flagship.

name: Dictate Policy
description: There are 3 or more laws in play.

name: Drive the Debate
description: You are elected as the outcome of a political favor.

name: Establish Hegemony
description: Control 3 planets that each have the same planet trait.

name: Forge an Alliance
description: Control 4 cultural planets.

name: Fuel the War Machine
description: Control 3 industrial planets.

name: Gather a Mighty Fleet
description: Have 5 or more dreadnoughts on the game board.

name: Hold Vast Reserves
description: Control 3 industrial planets outside of your home system.

name: Intimidate the Council
description: Have 1 or more ships in 3 systems that are adjacent to Mecatol Rex's system.

name: Make an Example of Their World
description: Use BOMBARDMENT to destroy the last ground force on a planet.

name: Master the Laws of Physics
description: Own 4 technologies of the same color.

name: Mine Rare Metals
description: Control 3 hazardous planets outside of your home system.

name: Monopolize Production
description: Control 4 industrial planets outside of your home system.

name: Occupy the Fringe
description: Have 9 or more ground forces on a single planet outside of your home system.

name: Own the Borderlands
description: Control 5 planets outside of your home system that are each adjacent to another player's home system.

name: Prove Endurance
description: Be the last player to pass during the action phase.

name: Seize an Icon
description: Control 3 legendary planets.

name: Spark a Rebellion
description: Win a combat against the current first player.

name: Spread to the Fringe
description: Have 1 or more units on 11 planets outside of your home system.

name: Stake Your Claim
description: Control 1 legendary planet.

name: Strengthen the Empire
description: Control Mecatol Rex.

name: Studies Begin
description: Own 3 technologies of the same color.

name: Take the Stage
description: Win a combat as the active player.

name: Turn Their Fleets to Dust
description: Use SPACE CANNON to destroy the last of a player's ships in a system.

name: Unveil Flagship
description: Win a space combat in a system that contains a planet controlled by another player using your flagship.

name: Use the Wormholes
description: Move 1 or more ships through a wormhole during the same movement step.
